final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected overhead components/buckets while excluding COGS and D&A. Manual review needed because the label 'Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses' appears twice in the income statement preview, so the exact intended SG&A personnel row cannot be uniquely distinguished from the duplicate by label alone. Also avoided total-like rows and avoided full 'Administrative costs' because a separate depreciation subline suggests that subtotal may include D&A.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Priority list uses the most specific interest expense line first, then broad financial expenses as fallback.
